title: RoutineStep — mcp
description: Deterministic MCP tool call. The named server must be installed via /mcp install. Args are validated against the tool's input schema (cached from tools/list) at runtime before invocation.

server.description: MCP server id as registered with the omp SDK's MCP client. In V1.5+ the Integrations page surfaces installed servers; for V1 this is a free-form string.

tool.description: Tool name as advertised by the server's tools/list.

args.description: Tool arguments. Templated. Validated against the tool's input schema at runtime.
